top3.sql:
WITH biggest_loan AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM loan
    ORDER BY amount DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
first_transaction AS (
    SELECT t.amount
    FROM trans t
    JOIN biggest_loan bl ON t.account_id = bl.account_id
    WHERE t.date = (
        SELECT MIN(date)
        FROM trans
        WHERE account_id = bl.account_id
    )
)
SELECT amount
FROM first_transaction;

WITH biggest_loan AS (
    SELECT 
        l.account_id,
        l.amount
    FROM loan l
    ORDER BY l.amount DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
account_open_date AS (
    SELECT 
        a.account_id,
        a.date AS account_open_date
    FROM account a
    JOIN biggest_loan bl ON a.account_id = bl.account_id
),

WITH biggest_loan AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM loan
    ORDER BY amount DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
first_transaction AS (
    SELECT t.amount
    FROM trans t
    JOIN biggest_loan bl ON t.account_id = bl.account_id
    WHERE t.date = (
        SELECT MIN(date)
        FROM trans
        WHERE account_id = bl.account_id
    )
)
SELECT amount
FROM first_transaction;

WITH biggest_loan AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM loan
    ORDER BY amount DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
first_transaction AS (
    SELECT t.amount
    FROM trans t
    JOIN biggest_loan bl ON t.account_id = bl.account_id
    ORDER BY t.date, t.trans_id
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT amount
FROM first_transaction;

WITH biggest_loan AS (
    SELECT 
        l.account_id,
        l.amount
    FROM loan l
    ORDER BY l.amount DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
first_transaction AS (
    SELECT 
        t.amount,
        t.date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.date) AS rn
    FROM trans t
    JOIN biggest_loan bl ON t.account_id = bl.account_id
    WHERE t.date > (SELECT date FROM account WHERE account_id = bl.account_id)
)
SELECT 
    amount
FROM first_transaction
WHERE rn = 1;

WITH biggest_loan AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM loan
    ORDER BY amount DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
first_transaction AS (
    SELECT t.amount
    FROM trans t
    JOIN biggest_loan bl ON t.account_id = bl.account_id
    WHERE t.date = (
        SELECT MIN(date)
        FROM trans
        WHERE account_id = bl.account_id
    )
)
SELECT amount
FROM first_transaction;

WITH biggest_loan AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM loan
    ORDER BY amount DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
first_transaction AS (
    SELECT t.amount
    FROM trans t
    JOIN biggest_loan bl ON t.account_id = bl.account_id
    ORDER BY t.date, t.trans_id
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT amount
FROM first_transaction;

WITH biggest_loan AS (
    SELECT account_id, amount
    FROM loan
    ORDER BY amount DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
first_transaction AS (
    SELECT t.amount, t.date
    FROM trans t
    JOIN biggest_loan bl ON t.account_id = bl.account_id
    ORDER BY t.date ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT amount
FROM first_transaction;

final.sql:
WITH biggest_loan AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM loan
    ORDER BY amount DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
first_transaction AS (
    SELECT t.amount
    FROM trans t
    JOIN biggest_loan bl ON t.account_id = bl.account_id
    WHERE t.date = (
        SELECT MIN(date)
        FROM trans
        WHERE account_id = bl.account_id
    )
)
SELECT amount
FROM first_transaction;
